rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(247, 253, 255), rgb(17, 22, 24)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));
fill: light-dark(rgb(12, 13, 13), rgb(125, 140, 155)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(49, 67, 84), rgb(169, 184, 199));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 40px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 222px;
